title: ArtifactMoved payload
description: Emitted (OPT-IN) when fs.move relocates a path in record mode. Carries the source + final destination so fs.read provenance mode can fold the relocation into a file's mutation history without re-reading the working tree. The default fs.move does NOT emit. The artifact's entity reference lives in the envelope (entity_kind=artifact, entity_slug=destination absolute path); the move intent is carried in the event rationale.

source.description: Path the entry was moved FROM (no longer exists after the move).

dest.description: Final path the entry was moved TO (dir-into resolved). Matched verbatim by fs.read provenance mode (json_extract(payload,'$.dest')).

is_dir.description: True when the moved entry was a directory rather than a file.

cross_device.description: True when source and dest were on different filesystems, so the move ran as a copy-then-remove rather than a plain rename.
